description: Fix IPv6 localhost resolution breaking all CLI-to-server communication. On systems where Node.js resolves localhost to ::1 (IPv6) first, the MCP server health endpoint returns the unauthenticated minimal response, causing opentabs status, doctor, plugin list, and opentabs-plugin build reload to silently fail. Replace all http://localhost URLs with http://127.0.0.1 in CLI and plugin-tools code.

userStories.title: Add DEFAULT_HOST constant and update all CLI localhost references to 127.0.0.1
userStories.description: As a plugin developer on a system where localhost resolves to IPv6 first, I want CLI commands (status, doctor, plugin list, config, audit, stop, update) to communicate with the server reliably so that the platform works out of the box without manual /etc/hosts workarounds.
acceptanceCriteria: DEFAULT_HOST constant exported from @opentabs-dev/shared with value '127.0.0.1'
All fetch() calls in platform/cli/src/ use http://127.0.0.1:${port} instead of http://localhost:${port}
No remaining http://localhost:${port} URL construction in platform/cli/src/ (excluding test files and user-facing display strings)
userStories.notes:
Add `export const DEFAULT_HOST = '127.0.0.1';` to platform/shared/src/constants.ts (~line 16, near DEFAULT_PORT). Re-export it from platform/shared/src/index.ts. Then update all CLI files that construct localhost URLs:

- platform/cli/src/notify-server.ts: lines 25 and 45 — `http://localhost:${port}/health` and `http://localhost:${port}/reload`
- platform/cli/src/commands/status.ts: line 73 — `http://localhost:${port}/health`
- platform/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts: line 81 — `http://localhost:${port}/health`
- platform/cli/src/commands/stop.ts: line 87 — `http://localhost:${port}/health`
- platform/cli/src/commands/audit.ts: line 236 — `http://localhost:${port}/audit`
- platform/cli/src/commands/plugin.ts: line 558 — `http://localhost:${port}/health`
- platform/cli/src/commands/config.ts: lines 258, 276, 712 — `http://localhost:${port}/health` and `http://localhost:${port}/reload`
- platform/cli/src/commands/update.ts: line 46 — `http://localhost:${port}/health`

In each file, import DEFAULT_HOST from @opentabs-dev/shared and replace the URL template. IMPORTANT: Do NOT change user-facing display strings or log messages that show 'localhost' for instructional purposes (e.g., 'Start the server at http://localhost:...'). Only change the actual fetch/HTTP request URLs. Also do NOT change test files — they use Request objects with localhost URLs which don't go through DNS resolution.

userStories.title: Update plugin-tools build.ts POST /reload URL to use 127.0.0.1
userStories.description: As a plugin developer building my plugin on an IPv6-first system, I want opentabs-plugin build to successfully notify the MCP server so that my plugin changes are picked up without manual server restart.
acceptanceCriteria: platform/plugin-tools/src/commands/build.ts uses http://127.0.0.1:${port} for the POST /reload request
userStories.notes: In platform/plugin-tools/src/commands/build.ts at ~line 257, replace `http://localhost:${port}/reload` with `http://${DEFAULT_HOST}:${port}/reload`. Import DEFAULT_HOST from @opentabs-dev/shared. This is the only localhost URL in plugin-tools.

userStories.title: Update MCP server startup log to show 127.0.0.1 instead of localhost
userStories.description: As a developer reading the server startup output, I want the logged URL to use 127.0.0.1 so that I can curl it directly without IPv6 surprises.
acceptanceCriteria: Server startup log message shows http://127.0.0.1:9515 instead of http://localhost:9515
userStories.notes: In platform/mcp-server/src/index.ts at ~line 227, change the log message from `http://localhost:${actualPort}` to `http://${DEFAULT_HOST}:${actualPort}`. Import DEFAULT_HOST from @opentabs-dev/shared. Also check platform/mcp-server/src/dev-proxy.ts at ~line 234 which has a similar log message. The test file http-routes.test.ts uses 'http://localhost' in Request objects — do NOT change those (they don't go through DNS).
